task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Company Directory with Search** (Level 6)

ARCHETYPE: directory_app. Shape: a searchable/filterable catalog of records — the CORE is the search endpoint, not CRUD. Users browse (read-only for the public) but only admins can add/edit. Include: GET /api/companies (lists all), GET /api/companies/search?q= (full-text search over name + industry fields), GET /api/companies/:id (single record). POST /api/companies exists for admin seeding but the star of the show is SEARCH.
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Companies table:
  name, required, min 1, max 200
  industry
  website
  description
  created_at_date, auto

# Test basic operations
test 'create and search companies':
  call POST /api/companies sending company:
    name is 'Acme Industries'
    industry is 'Manufacturing'
  expect response status 201
  
  call GET /api/companies/search?q=Acme
  expect response status 200

# GET all companies (public, read-only)
when user calls GET /api/companies:
  companies = get all Companies
  send back companies

# GET single company by id (public, read-only)
when user calls GET /api/companies/:id:
  company = look up Company with this id
  send back company

# Full-text search (public, read-only) - core archetype feature
when user calls GET /api/companies/search:
  all_companies = get all Companies
  results = search all_companies for 'acme'
  send back results

# POST create company (for seeding)
when user sends company to /api/companies:
  validate company:
    name is text, required, min 1, max 200
  saved = save company to Companies
  send back saved with status 201
